candidates.why: Direct cost line and primary COGS label; matches Cost of revenues/COGS numerically.

Inventory balance sheet item, not period COGS expense.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-type overhead subtotal, populated and above operating result.
Component within the SG&A subtotal, so less preferred than the explicit subtotal row.
SG&A component, but covered by the explicit SG&A subtotal.
Dedicated R&D expense line above operating result; should also be included in XSGA_COMPONENTS when separate so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Component within R&D subtotal, less preferred than the total R&D line.
R&D component, less preferred than the total R&D line.
Potential SG&A component but unpopulated and less clear than explicit SG&A row.
Explicit SG&A label but appears unused here; less preferred than populated 'Sales, marketing and administrative costs'.
Broader operating expense bucket that includes R&D and other operating income/expenses; too broad when explicit SG&A exists.

Could be SG&A-related overhead, but standalone supplemental disclosure and likely embedded already.
Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit SG&A row plus the separate R&D expense line because R&D is reported separately above operating result and is not embedded in the SG&A row. This lets XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD approximate SG&A excluding R&D.
